title: S + look forward to + V-ing

formulas.zh: 主語致力於/專注於/反對/習慣於做某事

explanation: 「look forward to」為片語動詞，to 為介系詞而非不定詞標記符，後接動名詞（V-ing）。用於表達期待或渴望某事物的到來。類似句型包括 be committed to、be dedicated to、be opposed to、be used to 等，這些片語中的 to 均為介系詞，後接 V-ing 形式。常見於日常對話和正式文體，表示積極的心理狀態或習慣性行為。注意：不可用 look forward for 或 look forward doing；to 後必須加動名詞。

examples.eng: I am looking forward to hearing from you soon.
examples.chi: 我期待不久後收到你的消息。

examples.eng: The students are looking forward to having summer vacation next month.
examples.chi: 學生們期待下個月放暑假。

examples.eng: She is committed to improving her English skills through daily practice.
examples.chi: 她致力於透過日常練習來提升英文能力。

examples.eng: We are used to waking up early in the morning for work.
examples.chi: 我們習慣於早上早起上班。

extension.tip: 判斷關鍵在於「to」的詞性。若 to 前為 look forward、committed、dedicated、opposed、used 等詞，to 為介系詞，必接 V-ing。不可誤認為不定詞而用 V 形。容易混淆的是 want/hope + to + V（此處 to 為不定詞標記符）。記住介系詞後永遠加 V-ing。

examples.test: ❌ I look forward to hear the news.
examples.result: → ✓ I look forward to hearing the news.（to 為介系詞，需用 V-ing）

examples.test: ❌ She is committed to work harder.
examples.result: → ✓ She is committed to working harder.（介系詞 to 後接動名詞）

examples.test: ✓ I hope to receive your reply soon.
examples.result: → 此句 to 為不定詞標記符（hope + to + V），與 look forward to 結構不同

extension.note: 介系詞 to 後必加 V-ing，記住「look forward to + V-ing」的黃金組合，同類詞彙也遵循此規則。

exercises.sentence: The whole family is looking forward to the annual reunion this winter.
exercises.translation: 整個家族期待今年冬天的年度聚會。

parts: more products to the international market next year.
exercises.sentence: Our company is committed to launching more products to the international market next year.
exercises.translation: 我們公司致力於明年向國際市場推出更多產品。

parts: in such a hot climate, but I'm trying to adapt.
exercises.sentence: I have never been used to living in such a hot climate, but I'm trying to adapt.
exercises.translation: 我從未習慣於在如此炎熱的氣候中生活，但我正在努力適應。

parts: the new environmental protection policies implemented by the government.
exercises.sentence: Many citizens are opposed to supporting the new environmental protection policies implemented by the government.
exercises.translation: 許多市民反對政府實施的新環保政策。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確答案完成句子，表達期待暑假到來
mc_exercises.question_eng: The students are looking forward to _______ summer vacation next month.
mc_exercises.explanation: 「look forward to」中的 to 為介系詞而非不定詞標記符，後接動名詞 V-ing 形式。正確答案為 having。A 選項缺少 -ing；C 和 D 選項將 to 誤認為不定詞標記符，導致文法錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確答案，填入同義的句型結構
mc_exercises.question_eng: I am looking forward to _______ your reply as soon as possible.
mc_exercises.explanation: 「look forward to」後需接動名詞形式。receiving 為正確答案。A 選項為原形動詞；C 選項為進行式動詞片語；D 選項為完成式，皆不符合「to + V-ing」的語法規則。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確答案，表達對比賽的期待與習慣
mc_exercises.question_eng: She has been looking forward to _______ in the competition, and she is used to _______ under pressure.
mc_exercises.explanation: 「look forward to」和「be used to」中的 to 皆為介系詞，後均接動名詞。正確答案為 participating; working。A 選項第一個空缺 -ing；B 選項兩個空都缺 -ing；D 選項誤將「be used to」後的 to 視為不定詞標記符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確答案，表達對招聘過程的期待與承諾
mc_exercises.question_eng: Candidates are looking forward to _______ the interview results, while the company is committed to _______ fair evaluation for all applicants.
mc_exercises.explanation: 「look forward to」和「be committed to」中的 to 均為介系詞，後接動名詞。正確答案為 hearing; providing。B、C、D 選項各有一個空填入原形動詞或動名詞，違反介系詞後接動名詞的規則。此題結合兩個同類片語，加深難度。

translation_exercises.answer: I look forward to having summer vacation.
hints: 句型框架：S + look forward to + V-ing，to 是介系詞，後接動名詞
注意：不可寫 look forward for 或 look forward to have

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我們的班級致力於參與社區志願服務。
translation_exercises.answer: Our class is committed to participating in community volunteer service.
hints: be committed to 表示「致力於、承諾」，同樣採用『to + V-ing』結構
注意：committed 後的 to 是介系詞，後面一定要加動名詞形式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 許多學生習慣於利用手機學習英文，但也有人反對這種做法。
translation_exercises.answer: Many students are used to using mobile phones to learn English, but some are opposed to this practice.
hints: 『be used to + V-ing』表示習慣於某事，『be opposed to + V-ing』表示反對，兩者 to 均為介系詞
注意：be used to 與 used to 不同；used to 表過去習慣，be used to 表現在習慣

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 儘管父母親反對我選擇藝術系，但我仍然期待著完成我的大學夢，因為我致力於追求自己的熱情。
translation_exercises.answer: Although my parents are opposed to my choosing an art major, I still look forward to fulfilling my university dream because I am dedicated to pursuing my passion.
key_points: 複雜句結構中的多個片語並用
hints: 題目包含三個不同的『to + V-ing』片語，需注意各自的含義與用法的一致性
注意：『my choosing』是所有格搭配動名詞的用法；避免混淆 be opposed to、look forward to 和 be dedicated to 的細微區別
